case_title: CUONG CHI CHUNG VS. LUXOR CAB, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUNG, CUONG CHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC. $2,384.49 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,604.49, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $1384.49, AND FOR PERSONAL INJURIES IN THE SUM OF $1000.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVED -*RUSSELL FETTER, DISPATCHER/AUTHORIZED TO ACCEPT SERVICE*) (SERVICE FEE $95.00) SERVED AUG-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,630.00 FILED BY CHUNG, CUONG CHI AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVED-**NAOMI GOODWIN, CLAIMS DEPARTMENT**) (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED AUG-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
